data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for GPS coordinates in photo metadata.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for GPS coordinates embedded in photo metadata, but the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or endpoints that confirm this functionality. The prior steps do not address the requirement for GPS tagging in photos, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence of the implementation or testing of this requirement, it cannot be validated.
gaps: No evidence of GPS coordinates being embedded in photo metadata.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the GPS coordinates requirement.
